title: Chapter 7
content:
Chapter 7: Chapter 7: Sword Master Memories

[Upgrading spiritual roots will cost you 100 lust points, and it will be doubled each level. Spiritual Roots are divided into 4 levels, Low/Mid/High/Peak. After reaching the peak, it will go to the next grade.]

’So, it will cost me 700 lust points to make my spiritual roots at peak level. How about my physique and bloodline?’

[For Physique and bloodline, it will cost you 500 lust points, and the same with the others; it will double each level. Physique and bloodline had the same level as the spiritual root. After reaching the peak, it will go to the next grade.]

’Fuck, it’s so expensive...’

After reflecting for a moment, he just continued to wait for his food.

Then the waitress appeared with his food. She leaned, still trying to show off her ample cleavage, but Damon ignored her as his eye already locked on the food. He exited since is the first food he ate after reincarnating.

He ate his meal quickly, and quite pleased with everything, especially the tea, which was rich with spiritual energy.

Once he finished, he pays for the bill and headed out, making his way through the road of Azure Cloud City.

His eyes move toward the mountain range on the horizon, its tall walls and the endless rows of pavilions and palaces around its slopes like some heavenly citadel.

’It must be a wonderful place to live...’ he looked toward the mountain’s peak, covered with a dense cloud.

That was probably where the elders and core disciples’ lives, along with the Sect leader over them all on the top.

He lingered on the thought of the view from up there before pulling himself back to the present, his attention shifting to the Thousand Myriad Pavilion, full of cultivators coming in and out.

"The Sect test in two days from now, and Ariel waiting for me tomorrow... I better take care of thing today since I probably won’t get a chance tomorrow."

As Damon muttered to himself, he walks faster until he reached one of the counter desks.

"Good morning, young master, how may I assist you?" The attendant greeted him.

"I need a high-quality cultivation room for the Elementary Spirit Realm. I’ll be staying until tomorrow morning."

"Ah... getting ready for the Azure Dragon Sect selection, I take it?" She flashed a cheerful smile toward Damon.

"That’ll be fifty silver coins for the night in a high-quality Elementary Spirit Realm cultivation room, number 69, second floor." She slid a card across the counter toward him.

"Thank you." He placed a gold coin down on the desk, and collected his change along with the card, then climbed to the second floor and came to a stop before the cultivation room door.

He pressed the card to the lock, and, after a brief pause, the heavy door swung open to reveal a spacious room with entirely black walls, illuminated only by Qi crystals emanating a faint, otherworldly blue glow.

He stepped inside, then the door sealing shut behind him.

He moves toward the center of the room, immediately sensing the Qi around him surge in density.

After a few moments, the spiritual energy was already twenty times denser than it had been outside.

’Not that it matters to him since he can’t cultivate the conventional way, but it’s something, at least.’

****

"System, how many lust points are needed for advancement?" Damon asked while looking at his status.

[It would cost 320 lust points for the Sixth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm, and 620 lust points for the Seventh Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm].

’Hm... Quite expensive...’Damon thought for a moment.

"Alright... make me the Sixth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm for now, since the energy crashed through him like a wave as Damon exhaled sharply.

[Cultivation increased! Fifth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → Sixth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -320 lust points.]

His muscles seized and trembled, a dull pain rippling across every inch of him before dissolving into something clean and invigorating.

"This is awesome..." He rose to stand up, and throw some kicks and punches into the air, watching the spiritual energy around him effected by his movement.

"Next, Let’s raise my spiritual roots to High."

[Upgrading Spiritual Roots...]

A flow of rainbow-hued spiritual energy rose from the floor and drifted down from the air, swirling around him in tightening rings, growing denser with every passing second before rushing inward and flooding through him.

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Mortal Grade - Low → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Mortal Grade - High. -300 lust points.]

[Your affinity with Fire, Water, Ice, Wind, Lightning, Earth, Nature, Light, and Dark has increased by 35.]

The flow of spiritual energy around him sharpened, as if a film had been peeled from his senses.

The satisfaction was still warm in his chest when a rather inconvenient thought surfaced.

"...I don’t actually know how to fight."

Back on Earth, violence earned you handcuffs and a court date. Here, it was simply the natural order, kill or be killed, the strong devouring the weak without ceremony.

"System, is there any way to fix that?"

[Host may browse the Miscellaneous section. Memories are available for purchase there.]

"Memories?"

[Memories are the accumulated experiences of cultivator’s past, such as battle instincts, muscle memory, and combat intuition. They become the host’s own experiences upon purchase.]

He opened the Lust Store without another word.

[Lust store]

[Lust points: 855]

<Cultivation resources>

<Cultivation/combat techniques>

<Weapons and armor>

<Recovery pills>

<Spiritual materials>

<Lust items>

<Spiritual Roots>

<Talismans>

<Bloodlines and constitutions>

<Miscellaneous>

He looked through the Miscellaneous categories, then into a seemingly infinite catalogue of options.

From sword masters and alchemy master’s up through grandmasters, all the way to the most expensive like Sword God, the catalogue spanned it all. What he could actually afford, however, was another matter entirely.

His eyes settled on the Sword Master Memories entry.

[Item: Sword Master Memories]

[Description: A memory of a sword master that chasing the Dao of the sword. With these memories, the user will gain sword master’s proficiency using sword, sword affinities, battle instincts, muscle memory, and combat intuition.]

[Price: 750]

"Hmm... For now, Sword master should be enough for me not to get killed immediately. Buy the Sword master memories."

[You bought Sword Master Memories. -750 lust points.]
